description_long: This object is a modern vehicle wheel featuring a black rubber tire mounted on a metallic alloy rim. The rim has a five-spoke design, each spoke smoothly curved and evenly spaced, converging at a central hub with a green circular emblem. The tire appears to have a low-profile, performance-oriented tread with subtle grooves visible along the surface. The sidewall of the tire is smooth, with minimal texturing or branding visible. The wheel is typical of those found on passenger cars, combining both functional and aesthetic elements. The overall construction suggests durability and strength, suitable for urban road conditions.
description: A black rubber tire mounted on a five-spoke metallic alloy rim with a green central hub emblem, designed for passenger vehicles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the five-spoke alloy rim, green central hub, and the full face of the tire.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the tire's width, smooth sidewall, and subtle tread pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the inner rim structure and the back of the spokes, with the hub area exposed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the tire's width and sidewall details.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five evenly spaced, smoothly curved spokes in a radial arrangement, each with a slight concave profile.
attribute_rim_design: The rim features a rounded, slightly concave face with a clean, modern look and a subtle lip; no beadlock or multi-piece construction is visible.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nuts arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Symmetrical tread pattern with shallow, continuous grooves and minimal block or sipe detailing, typical of performance or summer tires.
